title: Xtra Tender Kenyan Sweet Potatoes Casseroles
description: A nutty and tender Kenyan dish featuring coco sugar, perfect for nostalgic ovo-vegetarian-friendly meals. This casserole is a delicious and comforting side dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced sweet potatoes and brine, tossing to coat.
Let the sweet potatoes sit for 30 minutes to dry out slightly.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the coco sugar, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sugar mixture to the skillet with the onion and garlic, stirring to combine.
Add the sweet potatoes to the skillet, tossing to coat with the sugar mixture.
Transfer the sweet potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender and the top is lightly browned.
